stories.title: The Mystery of the Abandoned Villa
stories.intro: Tonight was strange in the neighborhood. Someone was killed and everyone says he was a good man.
stories.crimeDescription: The body was found in the living room. The door was open, and there were signs of struggle.

suspects.name: John Smith
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: Was seen arguing with the victim earlier.

suspects.name: Sarah Jones
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: Was seen leaving the area in a hurry.

suspects.name: Emily Davis
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: Her fingerprints were found on a glass

clues.text: A muddy footprint near the door
Neighbors heard shouting
A black car was seen speeding away
A note with a phone number was found
Security camera footage shows someone entering at 10 PM

stories.twist: The killer was actually his long lost brother

stories.title: The Old Cafe Murder
stories.intro: The place was unusually quiet. Suddenly, news spread that the cafe owner was murdered.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found lying behind the counter. Broken cups were everywhere and blood covered the floor. The door was locked from the inside, which made things more suspicious.

suspects.name: Saeed Elbanna
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He had a fight with the victim a few hours earlier

suspects.name: Mahmoud Attia
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He disappeared at the time of the murder

suspects.name: Noha Kamal
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She only used to visit the cafe late at night

suspects.name: Reem Hassan
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She was seen locking the cafe door quickly

clues.text: We found a cup with strange fingerprints
Someone heard something fall
A large amount of cash was missing
The cafe key was found in someone's pocket
The street camera recorded a covered face

stories.twist: It turned out the killer had been planning to steal the cafe for a long time

stories.title: The Apartment Building Crime
stories.intro: People woke up to screams. One of the residents had been killed.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found in the building entrance. The elevator was stuck and the lights were off. Blood stains covered the walls.

suspects.name: Hassan Eldib
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He was always complaining about the victim

suspects.name: Mai Ahmed
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She was leaving the building late at night

suspects.name: Sherif Nader
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He argued with the victim in public

suspects.name: Dina Youssef
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She lived directly above the victim

suspects.name: Karim Sabry
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He was late to work that day

suspects.name: Naglaa Farouk
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She changed her story more than once

clues.text: We found a button near the body
Several people heard a loud thump
The elevator access card was missing
A threatening voice message was found
The building cameras had their footage deleted

stories.twist: The argument turned into murder without intention

stories.title: The Furnished Apartment Murder
stories.intro: The apartment was newly rented. Two days later, a crime was discovered.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found on the floor next to the bed. The window was open and the curtain was torn.

suspects.name: Wael Hussein
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He lived there before and left suddenly

suspects.name: Mona Refaat
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She used to visit him frequently

suspects.name: Islam Hamdy
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He had problems with the victim

suspects.name: Hoda Sameh
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She called the ambulance very late

suspects.name: Ashraf Nabil
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He was seen standing under the window

clues.text: Fingerprints were found on the window
Someone heard a window opening
His wallet was missing money
The apartment key had been replaced
A phone call was recorded minutes before the murder

stories.twist: The killer entered while thinking the victim was asleep

stories.title: The Garage Murder
stories.intro: The smell of blood filled the place. The garage was completely closed.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found next to his car. The flashlight was broken and drag marks were visible on the ground.

suspects.name: Bassem Fathy
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He was standing near the garage at night

suspects.name: Hala Shawky
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She heard something but claimed ignorance

clues.text: We found brake marks on the ground
Someone heard an engine running
A car key that wasn't his was found
The garage flashlight was smashed intentionally
The garage camera was covered

stories.twist: The crime happened in a moment of rage

stories.title: The Office Murder
stories.intro: Work stopped suddenly. The manager was killed inside his office.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found sitting in his chair. Papers were scattered and the lights were off.

suspects.name: Ramy Saad
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He had constant arguments with the manager

suspects.name: Naglaa Tawfik
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She entered the office without permission

suspects.name: Hazem Kamal
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He deleted files from the computer

suspects.name: Dalia Magdy
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She was the last person to see him

clues.text: A cup of coffee was still warm
A door closing sound was heard
Important files were deleted
A strange fingerprint was found on the desk
The floor camera was turned off

stories.twist: The killer was afraid of being fired

stories.title: The Rooftop Murder
stories.intro: The night was quiet, but the rooftop witnessed a crime.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found near the edge. Clear signs of a struggle were present.

suspects.name: Fady Karam
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He frequently went to the rooftop

suspects.name: Basma Adel
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She claimed she saw someone running

clues.text: A shoe was found on the ground
Shouting noises were heard
A broken phone was found
Blood was found on the railing
An old threatening message was discovered

stories.twist: The fight went out of control

stories.title: The Warehouse Murder
stories.intro: The place was locked. No one expected what happened.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found among boxes. The lights were off.

suspects.name: Shady Mourad
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He was the last one present

clues.text: An open box was found
Footsteps were heard running
The warehouse key was broken
Blood was found on the boxes
The warehouse camera was damaged

stories.twist: The killer was afraid of being exposed

stories.title: The Club Murder
stories.intro: The club was crowded. Suddenly everything stopped.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found in the locker room. The door was half open.

suspects.name: Yasser Khaled
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He had an argument with the victim

clues.text: A towel with blood was found
A door closing sound was heard
A membership card was found
The locker lock was broken
The hallway camera footage was deleted

stories.title: The Clinic Murder
stories.intro: The clinic was empty. The crime was waiting.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found on the bed. Medical tools were scattered.

suspects.name: Dr. Samy
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: He was the last one present

suspects.name: Heba Kamal
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She was standing by the door

clues.text: A medical glove was found
A faint scream was heard
A patient file was missing
Some medicine was missing
The clinic camera was turned off

stories.twist: A dangerous secret had to be hidden

stories.title: The Storage Room Murder
stories.intro: The place was dark and uncomfortable.
stories.crimeDescription: He was found near the door. Signs of resistance were clear.

suspects.name: Yasmin Lotfy
suspects.suspiciousBehavior: She entered the storage room at night

clues.text: A broken lock was found
A loud knock was heard
An extra key was discovered
Blood was found on the floor
An old threatening message was found
